name: openai-mcp
description: Generate and edit images with gpt-image-1, and bounce ideas off ChatGPT for adversarial critique.
long_description: Two capabilities in one package. Image generation: create or edit images using OpenAI's gpt-image-1 model — images appear inline in the conversation and are saved to ~/Downloads. ChatGPT critique: send your reasoning to GPT-4o for a structured second opinion (Flaws, Blind spots, Alternatives, Counterarguments, Strengths, Overall assessment). One API key, zero other configuration.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai_api_key.description: Get your key from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys. Your organisation must have access to gpt-image-1 (verify at platform.openai.com/settings/organization/general).
